title: Protocol-09
summary: Cybernetic character bust with emissive circuitry and matte hard surface panels for a sci fi IP pitch.
problem: Design a readable hero silhouette at distance while keeping fine panel detail up close for marketing stills.
approach: High to low sculpt pipeline, trim sheets for panels, and emissive mask authored in Substance.
outcome: Approved for pitch bible; topology validated for real time preview in engine.

process.caption: Primary forms and anatomical landmarks in ZBrush.
Game ready topology and UV strategy.
Weathering, emissive masks, and material breakup.
